name: Sweetpotato Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the sweetpotatoes until tender, then remove the skins and any discolored portions. Press the sweetpotatoes through a ricer to yield about 1 quart of pulp.
2. Beat the yolks and whites of the eggs separately.
3. To the sweet potato pulp, add the yolk, butter, milk, and salt. Mix well.
4. Fold in the beaten egg whites.
5. Lightly pile the mixture into a greased baking dish.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees F) for 45 minutes, or until light and fluffy with a golden top.
